titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Dawud Al-Sarmi

text: و ما كان فيه عن داود الصرميّ فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه؛ و عليّ بن إبراهيم بن هاشم جميعا عن محمّد بن عيسى ابن عبيد، عن داود الصرميّ‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Dawud Al-Sarmi has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah and Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim together, from Muhammad ibn 'Isa ibn 'Ubayd, from Dawud Al-Sarmi.
